general.languageRequestDesc: Vote for the next language support on GitHub Discussions
general.previewThresholdDesc: Ask before generating video preview for files larger than this size

download.postProcessingDesc: Embed metadata and thumbnails into downloaded files
download.embedMetadataDesc: Add title, artist, description to files
download.numberPlaylistItemsDesc: Prefix expanded playlist downloads with their playlist order
download.splitEmbeddedChaptersDesc: Create separate files from chapters included in the video
download.numberChapterFilesDesc: Prefix split chapter files with chapter numbers
download.queuePersistenceDesc: Keep queued downloads after closing Youwee
download.persistDownloadQueueDesc: Restore YouTube, Universal, and Gallery queue items when the app opens again
download.pluginsDesc: Create plugin workspaces, build .ywp plugin files, and manage installed plugins in Youwee
download.pluginCreateDialogDesc: Create a development workspace in a folder you choose. Build it into a .ywp plugin file before importing it into Youwee.
download.pluginCreateLocationPlaceholder: Choose the folder where Youwee should create this workspace
download.pluginCreateIconPlaceholder: Optional Lucide icon name, e.g. Atom or package-open
download.pluginCreateIconHelp: Use any Lucide icon name. Youwee accepts both PascalCase and kebab-case, then falls back to Puzzle if the icon name is missing or unknown.
download.pluginCreateRuntimeHelp: Youwee creates a JavaScript plugin scaffold. Deno is the runtime used inside Youwee, while Bun is only the local build and packaging toolchain for this workspace.
download.pluginCreatePermissionsHelp: Declare the runtime capabilities this plugin will request. Youwee resolves the actual file system paths later based on the current payload, plugin directory, temporary files, and user-selected paths.
download.pluginCreateConfigFieldsHelp: Declare plugin configuration fields here so Youwee can write them into plugin.json and render the right UI later.
download.pluginCreateConfigFieldPlaceholderPlaceh: Optional hint shown in the input
download.pluginCreateConfigFieldDescriptionPlaceh: Explain what this field is used for.
download.pluginCreateConfigFieldDefaultOptionsHin: Add option values first so you can choose defaults here.
download.pluginCreateConfigErrorKeyRequired: Each configuration field needs a key.
download.pluginCreateConfigErrorDuplicateKey: The field key "{{key}}" is used more than once.
download.pluginCreateConfigErrorLabelRequired: Each configuration field needs a display label.
download.pluginCreateConfigErrorOptionsRequired: Select fields need at least one option.
download.pluginCreateConfigErrorOptionDuplicate: The option value "{{value}}" is used more than once.
download.pluginCreateConfigErrorNumberInvalid: The {{key}} value must be a valid number.
download.pluginCreateConfigErrorMinGreaterThanMax: Minimum cannot be greater than maximum.
download.pluginCreateConfigErrorDefaultOption: The default value must match one of the available options.
download.pluginCreateConfigErrorDefaultMultiOptio: The default selection "{{value}}" is not in the option list.
download.pluginCreateConfigErrorSummary: Fix the configuration field errors before creating this workspace.
download.pluginCreateListPlaceholder: One item per line or separated by commas
download.pluginCreateHelp: This creates source files only. The workspace is not installed into Youwee until you install dependencies with Bun, test the plugin with Deno, pack a .ywp plugin file, and import that plugin into Youwee.
download.pluginImportHelp: Inspect a .ywp plugin file before installing it.
download.pluginImportDisclaimerIntro: Plugins can run local code on your machine. Import plugins only when you understand the source and trust how they were built.
download.pluginImportDisclaimerBody: Plugins are created by third-party authors and are not operated or managed by Youwee. Review the source, repository, and behavior carefully before using them. Youwee is not responsible for data loss, account issues, or other damage caused by a plugin.
download.pluginImportDisclaimerSignature: A plugin signature only helps Youwee verify the integrity of the packaged .ywp file. It does not mean Youwee has audited the plugin logic or guarantees that the plugin is safe.
download.pluginImportDisclaimerRecommendation: Prefer plugins from authors you trust, and prioritize plugins with public source code so you can inspect what they do before installing them.
download.pluginAttachWorkspaceConfirm:
Attach this workspace to Youwee for live debugging?

This runs source files directly from the workspace and does not use packaged plugin checks. Only attach workspaces you control and trust.
download.pluginInspectError: Failed to inspect the .ywp plugin file.
download.pluginInstallConfirmLabel: I understand this plugin can run local code on this machine.
download.pluginInstallConfirmHelp: Only install plugins you created yourself or reviewed from a source you trust.
download.pluginEmptyDesc: Import a .ywp plugin file to install a plugin, or attach a workspace when you want to debug source code directly in Youwee.
download.pluginWorkspaceFlowDesc: Use one development flow for every plugin: create a workspace, build a .ywp file, then import that plugin into Youwee.
download.pluginWorkspaceStep1Desc: Generate plugin files in a folder you control outside the installed plugins directory.
download.pluginWorkspaceStep2Desc: Install dependencies and package with the Bun toolchain, then test the plugin runtime with Deno.
download.pluginWorkspaceStep3Desc: Attach the workspace for live debugging, or import the .ywp plugin file when you want to test the packaged plugin.
download.pluginWorkspaceCreatedDesc: {{name}} is ready for development and packaging.
download.pluginWorkspaceNextStep1: 1. Open the workspace and install its dependencies.
download.pluginWorkspaceNextStep2: 2. Attach this workspace to Youwee when you want to debug source code without rebuilding.
download.pluginWorkspaceNextStep3: 3. Test with Deno, then pack and import the .ywp plugin file when you want to try the packaged plugin.
download.pluginWorkspaceOpenError: Failed to open the plugin workspace.
download.pluginTimeoutDefaultHelp: Using the default timeout from this plugin's manifest.
download.pluginTimeoutOverrideHelp: Using a custom timeout. Manifest default: {{seconds}}s.
download.pluginTimeoutError: Plugin timeout must be greater than 0.
download.pluginPackageDesc: Plugin details from the manifest and installation source.
download.pluginGuideDesc: Read the plugin README written by the plugin author.
download.pluginWorkflowDesc: Choose which plugins run after a download completes, set their order, and decide what happens if a step fails.
download.pluginWorkflowEmptyDesc: Add one or more plugins to build your post-processing flow.
download.pluginWorkflowStepOrderHelp: Steps run from top to bottom after the download completes.

download.queued.title: When added to queue
download.queued.desc: Manage plugins that run when a download item is added to the queue.

download.beforeStart.title: Before download starts
download.beforeStart.desc: Manage plugins that run right before a download begins.

download.completed.title: Run after download
download.completed.desc: Manage plugins that run after a download finishes.

download.failed.title: When download fails
download.failed.desc: Manage plugins that run after a download ends in error.

download.pluginWorkflowReminderToast: The plugin is enabled. Add it to a workflow if you want it to run automatically.
download.pluginDetachWorkspaceConfirm: Detach {{name}} from Youwee? The source files in your workspace will not be deleted.
download.pluginProviderDesc: Plugin authors declare supported providers. You can only pick one of those compatible providers.
download.pluginProviderDefaultError: Failed to update default runtime provider.
download.pluginLogsDesc: Hook trigger history and runtime details for this plugin.
download.pluginLogsClearConfirm: Clear all stored logs for this plugin?
download.pluginLogsEmptyDesc: This plugin has not produced any stored log entries yet.
download.pluginRuntimeDesc: Provider selection is language-aware. Deno resolves internally between app-managed and system binaries.
download.pluginOverviewGuideDesc: Review the recommended workspace-to-plugin flow and the runtime environment that Youwee supports.
download.pluginOverviewGuideNotePrimary: For JavaScript plugins, Deno is the runtime used inside Youwee.
download.pluginOverviewGuideNoteSecondary: Use the workspace for development and debugging. Bun is only the local install/build/pack toolchain before you install a signed .ywp plugin file.
download.pluginRuntimeGuideDesc: Choose the default provider per language and review which runtime binaries are currently available on this machine.
download.pluginRuntimeGuideNotePrimary: Plugin authors declare supported providers in the manifest. A plugin can only run on providers it explicitly supports.
download.pluginRuntimeGuideNoteSecondary: The Deno provider is a single logical provider. Youwee resolves its internal source automatically between app-managed and system binaries.
download.pluginCompatibilityDesc: Choose the runtime provider and review version support for this plugin.
download.pluginRequestedPermissions: These permissions come from the plugin manifest.
download.pluginNoExtraPermissions: This plugin does not request extra permissions.
download.pluginPermissionEnableError: Failed to enable plugin with the selected permissions.
download.pluginEnablePermissionsDesc: {{name}} requests permissions before it can run.
download.pluginEnablePermissionsHelp: Permissions you leave off here will stay blocked. If the plugin tries to use them later, the run will fail with a permission error in logs.
download.pluginPermissionFilesystemHelp: Use these capabilities instead of hardcoding machine-specific paths. For example, user-selected capabilities work with config fields that use file or directory inputs.
download.pluginPermissionFsPayloadDirectoryRead: Read files next to the downloaded file
download.pluginPermissionFsPayloadDirectoryWrite: Write files next to the downloaded file
download.pluginPermissionFsUserSelectedRead: Read files or folders chosen by the user
download.pluginPermissionFsUserSelectedWrite: Write files or folders chosen by the user
download.pluginConfigDesc: These fields come from plugin.json configFields. Youwee validates and injects the saved values when the plugin runs.
download.pluginConfigEmpty: This plugin does not declare configurable fields.
download.pluginConfigReplacePlaceholder: Saved. Enter a new value to replace it
download.pluginConfigInvalidNumber: Enter a valid number before saving.
download.pluginEnvDesc: Enter values for the environment variables requested by this plugin. They will be injected when the plugin runs.
download.pluginEnvReplacePlaceholder: Saved. Enter a new value to replace it
download.pluginEnvSaveError: Failed to save plugin environment values.
download.liveFromStartDesc: Download live streams from the beginning instead of current time
download.aria2Desc: Use aria2c as external downloader for yt-dlp
download.aria2ToggleDesc: Pass --downloader aria2c for faster multi-connection downloads
download.aria2ArgsDesc: Supports raw args (e.g. -x 16 -s 16) or prefixed args (aria2c:...)
download.sponsorBlockDesc: Skip sponsored segments using community data
download.sponsorBlockToggleDesc: Auto-skip sponsors & promotions in downloaded videos
download.sponsorBlockHint: Cut = remove from video (requires FFmpeg). Chapter = mark as chapter only.
download.autoRetryDesc: Automatically retry transient network and live stream errors
download.autoRetryEnableDesc: Retry failed downloads automatically when errors are temporary
download.autoRetryConfigDesc: Set retry attempts and delay between retries

ytdlpAdvanced.title: yt-dlp Advanced Options
ytdlpAdvanced.description: Use vetted yt-dlp options for difficult sites and network tuning
ytdlpAdvanced.toggleDesc: Pass supported yt-dlp options to download commands only. Aria2, cookies, proxy, output, and retry options stay managed by Youwee.
ytdlpAdvanced.helper: Only allowlisted yt-dlp options are accepted. Bilibili uses app-managed headers when needed.

option.impersonateDesc: Ask yt-dlp to impersonate a supported browser client, such as chrome.
option.socketTimeoutDesc: Seconds to wait before yt-dlp gives up on a network socket.
option.userAgentDesc: Override the request User-Agent for non-Bilibili downloads.
option.refererDesc: Send a custom HTTP referer URL for non-Bilibili downloads.
option.addHeadersDesc: Send a custom non-sensitive HTTP header. Sensitive headers are blocked.
option.sleepRequestsDesc: Seconds to wait between metadata/network requests.
option.sleepIntervalDesc: Seconds to wait before each download in a list.
option.maxSleepIntervalDesc: Upper bound for randomized sleep interval.
option.concurrentFragmentsDesc: Number of HLS/DASH fragments to download in parallel.
option.throttledRateDesc: Minimum rate before yt-dlp treats the connection as throttled.
option.httpChunkSizeDesc: Chunk size for chunk-based HTTP downloads.
option.geoBypassDesc: Ask yt-dlp to use its default geo bypass behavior.
option.geoBypassCountryDesc: Use a two-letter country code for geo bypass.
option.matchFiltersDesc: Skip videos that do not match a yt-dlp filter expression.
option.formatSortDesc: Adjust yt-dlp format sorting without replacing Youwee quality settings.
option.youtubePlayerClientDesc: Use a vetted YouTube extractor player client preset.

remoteDownload.telegramRemoteDesc: Receive download commands from a Telegram bot
remoteDownload.telegramErrorChatRequired: At least one allowed chat ID is required.
remoteDownload.telegramSetupGuideDesc: Create a bot and find your Telegram chat ID.
remoteDownload.telegramSetupGuideIntro: Follow these steps once, then paste the token and allowed chat IDs here.
remoteDownload.telegramSetupStep_createBot_desc: Open @BotFather in Telegram, send /newbot, then follow the prompts to create a bot.
remoteDownload.telegramSetupStep_copyToken_desc: Copy the token BotFather gives you and paste it into Bot Token. Do not share this token.
remoteDownload.telegramSetupStep_openChat: Start a chat with your bot
remoteDownload.telegramSetupStep_openChat_desc: Open your new bot in Telegram and send /start so Telegram creates an update for your account.
remoteDownload.telegramSetupStep_getChatId_desc: Open https://api.telegram.org/bot<token>/getUpdates in a browser and copy message.chat.id from the response. For groups, add the bot to the group and send a message first.
remoteDownload.telegramSetupStep_allowChatId_desc: Paste the numeric chat ID into Allowed Chat IDs, then send /help to your bot to test the connection.
remoteDownload.telegramPlainUrlAction: When a message only contains a link
remoteDownload.telegramPlainUrlActionDesc: Choose what Youwee should do when you share a URL directly to the bot.
remoteDownload.telegramAllowedChatIdsDesc: Only these Telegram chats can control Youwee
remoteDownload.telegramGuideIntro: Send one of these commands to your configured Telegram bot.
remoteDownload.telegramCommand_start_desc: Show the command keyboard and setup help.
remoteDownload.telegramCommand_add_desc: Add a URL to the Youwee queue without starting a download.
remoteDownload.telegramCommand_download_desc: Add a URL and start downloading if Youwee is idle.
remoteDownload.telegramCommand_quality_desc: Quality is optional. audio or mp3 downloads audio only.
remoteDownload.telegramCommand_status_desc: Show whether Youwee is idle or downloading, plus queue counts.
remoteDownload.telegramCommand_queue_desc: Show recent queue items and their current state.
remoteDownload.telegramCommand_run_desc: Start pending downloads in the queue.
remoteDownload.telegramCommand_help_desc: Show the available bot commands in Telegram.

plugins.title: Plugins
plugins.description: Create and manage plugins to automate tasks in Youwee

dependencies.title: Dependencies
dependencies.confirmSwitchSystemYtdlp:
Switch yt-dlp source to System?

If system yt-dlp is missing or misconfigured, downloads/metadata may fail until you switch back to App managed.
dependencies.confirmSwitchSystemFfmpeg:
Switch FFmpeg source to System?

If system FFmpeg is missing or misconfigured, video processing may fail until you switch back to App managed.
dependencies.systemFfmpeg: System FFmpeg - update via package manager
dependencies.systemYtdlp: System yt-dlp - update via package manager
dependencies.systemGallerydl: System gallery-dl - update via package manager
dependencies.systemManagedOnlyDesc: Gallery downloads use your system gallery-dl binary only. Install and update it outside the app.
dependencies.systemDeno: System Deno - update via deno upgrade
dependencies.fixesUnableToDownload: Fixes "unable to download" errors on some videos

network.title: Network & Authentication
network.description: Configure cookies and proxy for downloads
network.videoAuthDesc: Access private, age-restricted, or members-only videos
network.fullDiskAccessDesc: macOS requires Full Disk Access permission to read browser cookies.
network.browserMustBeClosedDesc: On Windows, Chrome 127+ blocks cookie access (App-Bound Encryption). Close your browser completely, or use Firefox / Cookie File mode for best results.
network.cookieFileHelp: Use Netscape cookie format. Export from browser extensions like
network.cookieSkipPatternsDesc: Downloads matching these tags will run without browser or cookie file authentication.
network.cookieSkipPatternsHelp: Use domains or domain/path prefixes. Example: facebook.com or facebook.com/reel.
network.networkProxyDesc: Route downloads through a proxy server

ai.title: AI Features
ai.summaryStyleDesc: How detailed the summary should be
ai.maxTokensDesc: Leave empty to send no output token limit. Set a number only when your provider needs one.
ai.transcriptLanguagesDesc: Languages to try when fetching subtitles
ai.whisperDesc: Use OpenAI Whisper for videos without captions
ai.usingOpenAI: Using your OpenAI API key for Whisper
ai.ollamaHelp: Make sure Ollama is running on your computer (e.g. `ollama serve`) and the model has been downloaded before testing (e.g. `ollama run gpt-oss:20b`).
ai.lmStudioHelp: LM Studio must be open, Local Server API enabled, and the model loaded into memory.
ai.conciseStyleTip: The "Concise" style is highly suitable for most needs, providing a visual layout with bullet points summarizing the main ideas.
ai.aiOfflineDesc: Enable AI features to automatically generate quick video summaries, translate subtitles, and transcribe offline using Whisper.
ai.aiBannerDesc: Automatically translate, analyze layout, and quickly summarize video subtitles with high accuracy. Supports a wide range of providers from world-leading cloud services to highly secure, offline local servers.

extension.title: Browser Extension
extension.description: Download and install Youwee extension for one-click send from browser to app
extension.desktopRequiredDesc: Open the latest release if you want to download all browser extension packages from one place.
extension.chromiumDesc: Chrome, Edge, Brave, Opera, Vivaldi, Arc, Coc Coc and other Chromium-based browsers (.zip package)
extension.guideDesc: Step-by-step setup and troubleshooting for extension connection
extension.chromiumStep2: Open chrome://extensions (or your browser extension page).
extension.chromiumStep3: Enable Developer mode, then click Load unpacked.
extension.firefoxStep2: Drag and drop the .xpi file into Firefox.
extension.firefoxStep3: Confirm installation and allow opening Youwee when prompted.
extension.cliDesc: Send downloads to Youwee directly from your terminal.
extension.cliInstallDesc: Make the Youwee command available from any folder in your terminal.
extension.cliInstallSuccessDesc: Installed at {{path}}. You may need to open a new terminal.
extension.cliLinuxNote: Installed via system package. The Youwee command is already available.
extension.cliWindowsNote: Added a command shim to WindowsApps. Open a new terminal to use it.
extension.cliNotePathNotInPath: {{path}} exists, but it is not in PATH.
extension.cliNoteUnsupported: CLI install is not supported on this platform.

about.title: About
about.appDesc: All-in-one video toolkit — download, edit, follow channels & AI summarize
about.communityDesc: Follow the project, join discussions, and leave feedback around Youwee.
about.buyMeACoffeeDesc: Help fund releases, fixes, and cross-platform testing.
about.autoUpdateDesc: Check for updates when app opens
about.shareDesc: Share Youwee with your friends on popular social platforms.
about.shareText: Check out Youwee - a modern desktop app for downloading and processing videos.

system.title: System
system.hideDockOnCloseDesc: Remove app from Dock when the window is closed. Use the system tray icon to reopen.
system.noSettingsForPlatform: No system settings available for this platform.
